title: Recommendation issued body (v1)
description: The `body` of the §8.2 response emitted on the `recommendation-issued` port when the chip requests one recommendation effect — the shape a host validates as `response.body`. The terminal response kind is `finding` (one of the four §8.2 run outcomes); the issued recommendation rides in `body.recommendation`. The effect itself is dispatched by the host under human approval; this records the stable effect key and lineage. The same port also carries an `abstain` body (with `reason`), so only `lineageKey` is universally required.

recommendation.description: The issued recommendation marker (e.g. {issued: true, effectKey}).

lineageKey.description: Passthrough of the originating §8.1 signal lineage key.

reason.description: Present on an abstain body, e.g. 'evidence-taint-lost-refuse-to-launder'.
